Concepts webDatabricksDataGrailAtlanRunpodVectara

ROI

Use ROI to judge structure before buying more activity

The calculator is a framing tool. It helps a team estimate the value of fixing operating friction before it commits to new spend.

Use the calculator See the blog
01

Friction

Why ROI is misunderstood

ROI is often framed as software output instead of system behaviour.

Tool cost is isolated from process quality
Lead volume is confused with commercial value
No clear baseline exists
Reporting is too weak to support the estimate
02

Modèle opératoire

Inputs

A useful estimate starts with a small number of commercial inputs.

Monthly lead volume
Conversion rate
Average commercial value
Expected system improvement
03

Processus

Calculation logic

The logic should stay simple enough to explain in one conversation.

01

Define the baseline

02

Estimate the improvement

03

Calculate incremental value

04

Use the result as a planning tool

04

Preuve

Results

The result should be read as economic room created by better operating design.

Potential uplift from cleaner conversion
Recovered value from faster follow-up
Less leakage between handoffs
More confidence around planning
05

Contexte

Interpretation

The ROI estimate is directional. It is useful because it makes assumptions visible before a deeper diagnostic.

06

Modèle opératoire

Scenarios

Different system changes create different ROI patterns.

CRM clean-up
Outbound rebuild
Signal activation
Reporting redesign

ROI

Valeur incrémentale estimée

€0

Turn the estimate into a real system review

Consulter

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.
